entry.title: Fiori App: "Post Goods receipt for purchasing Document"
entry.content:
Serial number managed material via the fiori app "Post Goods receipt for Purchasing Document "  unable to see the option/tab/field to enter serial number. Is this standard functionality of the S/4HANA fiori app or do we need to do some enhancement / Customization?


GR for purchasing document should be done via GUI App " post Goods movement".

Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: Re: Fiori App: "Post Goods receipt for purchasing Document"
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

 

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the "Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document" Fiori app does not natively support the entry of serial numbers for serial number-managed materials. Serial number handling in SAP typically requires additional functionality, such as:
 
1. Using the "Post Goods Movement" App: This is the standard app that allows serial number entry during goods receipt.
 
2. Enhanced Features in Advanced Warehousing (EWM): If using embedded EWM, serial numbers are often managed through separate processes.
 
3. Customization/Enhancements: If you need serial number entry directly in the Fiori Post Goods Receipt app, you might have to explore extensibility options.
 
 
Recommendation:
If serial number tracking is required, use the Post Goods Movement (MIGO) app or check with SAP if newer updates support this requirement in Fiori.
 
I hope this will answer your question in detail.
 
Best regards,
Jeremy

Is anyone able to help with getting the image to fit?

entry.title: Why Maximizing Transactions in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central is Critical
entry.content:
In today's dynamic business environment, HR teams are under increasing pressure to improve efficiency, ensure compliance, and provide seamless employee experiences. SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC) serves as the foundation for modern HR management, and maximizing the number of HR transactions within EC is crucial to unlocking its full potential.

The Power of a Centralized HR System

Employee Central is designed to be the core HR system of record, meaning it should handle all key HR transactions, from employee data management to payroll, benefits, and time tracking. A well-configured EC system ensures that organizations move away from scattered, disconnected processes and embrace a unified, automated HR approach.

By consolidating HR transactions within EC, organizations can achieve:

✅ Operational Efficiency – automating and optimizing HR processes reduces administrative burden and allows HR teams to focus on strategic initiatives rather than manual tasks. This includes streamlining position management, improving employee record updates, and facilitating approvals with minimal human intervention. 

✅ Enhanced Compliance  – a centralized system ensures adherence to global and local labor laws, tax regulations, and company policies. Employee Central helps businesses avoid costly compliance errors by providing automated regulatory updates, audit trails, and built-in compliance frameworks.

✅ Reliable HR Data – Having a single source of truth ensures that workforce decisions are based on accurate and up-to-date data. Integrated reporting and analytics provide real-time workforce insights, allowing HR teams to proactively address challenges such as turnover rates, hiring trends, and workforce planning. 

Value Realization: Beyond Configuration

 

The journey to maximizing value from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central does not start with system configuration—it starts with redefining business processes. Organizations moving from an on-premise system to the cloud must first consolidate and standardize their HR operations. This transition enables:

  • Stronger Alignment with Business Strategy – A well-defined HR process framework ensures that Employee Central is tailored to the company's goals and workforce structure.
  • Process Standardization Across Regions & Departments – Eliminating fragmented, localized processes and ensuring consistency in HR operations.
  • Data-Driven Decision Making – Establishing a clean and accurate HR data foundation before system configuration.

Once business processes are optimized, they are translated into technology through Employee Central. The system then becomes an enabler of efficiency, allowing HR teams, managers, and employees to leverage it as part of their daily workflow. The real value is not just in configuring EC—it is in ensuring that employees and managers actively use it for HR transactions, self-service, and decision-making.

Key HR Transactions to Manage in Employee Central

Managing HR transactions efficiently within EC ensures seamless workflows and better HR service delivery. Some key HR transactions that should be handled within EC include:

  • Position Creation & Management – Automating position creation improves organizational agility by reducing administrative workload for managers. Employee Central integrates position management with recruiting and succession planning, ensuring continuity and proper workforce planning.
  • Workforce Transactions – Handling promotions, transfers, terminations, and personal data updates efficiently. With EC, employees and managers can easily make changes through self-service functionalities, reducing the need for HR intervention.
  • Payroll & Benefits Integration – Ensuring accurate and timely payroll processing by connecting EC with payroll and benefits systems. This eliminates errors caused by data inconsistencies and ensures employees receive their salaries and benefits without delays.
  • Time & Attendance Management – Managing leave requests, work schedules, and time tracking within EC creates a seamless connection between employee work hours and payroll processing. Employee Central's time management solutions help organizations maintain labor law compliance and optimize workforce productivity.

Recent Innovations Enhancing HR Transactions

SAP continues to invest in Employee Central, embedding AI and automation to improve HR efficiency. Recent innovations include:

  • AI-Assisted Writing for HR Processes – Automating job descriptions and policy documentation.
  • Enhanced Organizational Charts – Providing a more intuitive, dynamic view of company hierarchies.
  • Quick Actions for Managing Team Positions – Allowing HR teams and managers to initiate position changes more easily.
  • Mobile-Optimized Employee Self-Service – Enabling employees to update personal details, submit leave requests, and manage HR transactions on the go.

Best Practices for Maximizing Employee Central Usage

To get the most out of Employee Central, organizations should:

  • Conduct Regular System Audits – Identify gaps in system usage and optimize configurations to align with business needs.
  • Train HR Teams & Employees – Provide continuous training to ensure users can fully leverage EC’s capabilities.
  • Utilize Adoption Insights – Leverage SAP’s adoption dashboards to analyze trends and improve HR process efficiency.
  • Integrate with Other SAP Solutions – Ensure EC is fully integrated with payroll, finance, and other enterprise applications for a seamless digital HR ecosystem.

Next Steps

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central is more than just a system of record—it’s a system of action. Ensure you are making the most of it to drive efficiency, compliance, and workforce satisfaction.

If your organization is not yet maximizing Employee Central for HR transactions, now is the time to act. By increasing adoption and usage of EC’s capabilities, HR teams can drive measurable value across the organization.

To get inspiration on where to start, we have recorded a webinar as part of the Supercharge your HR with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central programme. 

The recording on-demand and the more detailed presentation is available on-demand here: https://play.goconsensus.com/a2682b296?fn=Egle&ln=Pociute&em=egle.pociute@sap.com&co=SAPSuccessFactors

Additional Information 

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central has a few powerful features that drive HR transactions and we've published a couple of blog posts that you may also find useful:

  • Boosting HR Productivity with Employee & Manager Self-Services
  • Quick guide to actually configuring Quick Action Cards in SAP SF EC

Other useful links

  • Architectural Leading Practices
  • Best Practices
  • HR Process Library
  • Leading Practices Framework
  • Latest Release & Roadmap
  • Empowerment Center

entry.title: Re: We need the provision for FB01 & F-48
entry.content:
Hola Prabin

I'll start answering per requirement:

1) How to post the Journal entry Customer (A) Credit  to customer (B) Debit, - please suggest the app to post the entry. 

**  Customer to customer journal entry.**

Please use the Post Incoming Payments app. Use the same Company Code for all the Business Partners.

**Customer to Vendor journal entry**

Please use the Clear Outgoing Payments app. Use the same Company Code for all the Business Partners.

For the 2nd (Third) requirement: SAP system Does not support to Direct down payment (F-48), 

I cannot understand what the requirement is.

  • What does a normal down payment mean for the first down payment? 
  • Can you add an example with the details of special GL/GL accounts/etc?

Thank you

Edna

entry.title: OData is calling twice the request - InboundEmployee
entry.content:
Hi Everyone
I am getting this error in the log, after creating an employee, by postman:
Error: de.hybris.platform.odata2services.odata.RuntimeIOException: An error occurred while processing the request. Please see the log for details.

The strangest thing, that it processes and creates normally, but then in processing the request it gives this exception above, a second call/request.

Why I understand here the OData is calling twice the request:
{{local}}/odata2webservices/InboundEmployee/Employees
There is some config of OData, or it’s a particularity, someone can give me a help.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Carry Over Balance Max Limit of 5 Days, Should be Booked by a Certain Date
entry.content: Where/what field will the first rule be attached

entry.title: Re: Manage Purchase Requisitions filtering
entry.content:
Hello,

In the Manage Purchase Requisitions (F2229) app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, you can restrict users to only see purchase requisitions (PRs) created by users in their own department by implementing the following approach:

1. Restricting via Business Role Authorization

SAP Public Cloud uses Business Roles for authorization. You can configure the necessary restrictions in SAP Identity and Access Management (IAM).

Steps:

  1. Open Maintain Business Roles App (F2748)

    • Identify the business role assigned to the users who will be using the Manage Purchase Requisitions app.

  2. Edit Restrictions for the Business Role

    • Find the Business Catalog: SAP_MM_BC_PR_PROCESS_MC (Manage Purchase Requisitions).

    • Go to the Restrictions tab.

    • Locate the restriction object related to Purchase Requisitions.

    • Set the restriction based on Organizational Unit (Org. Unit) or Department.

  3. Use Authorization Field for Organizational Unit

    • If the department is linked to an Organizational Unit, restrict by Purchasing group or Cost Center (if mapped to departments).

2. Implementing Custom CDS View-Based Restriction (If Needed)

If business role restrictions are not sufficient, a Custom CDS View can be used to filter PRs dynamically.

Steps:

  1. Create a Custom CDS View in the “Custom CDS Views” App

  2. Use Custom Logic in Business Role Restrictions

3. Alternative Workaround: Use Default Filters

If authorization restrictions are not an option, encourage users to apply a default filter in the Fiori app:

  • Open Manage Purchase Requisitions (F2229).

  • Click Adapt Filters.

  • Add Created By and filter by department-based users.

  • Save it as a Personalized Default View.

Hope that will help.

Best regards,

Patryk Walędziak

entry.title: Re: ITSM on Public Cloud Asset Management
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

S4 Hana cloud public edition offers functionalities within the Asset Management module that can cover your needs.

The My Maintenance Requests app enables users to create and management maintenance requests for technical objects, allowing maintenance planners to assess and process these requests effectively.

Additionally, the Perform Maintenance Jobs app supports recording details such as the "as-found" condition and service specifics during maintenance taks, faciliting comprehensive documentation and analysis.

Hope this will answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Create Shipment VT01N tile/Business Catalogue in SAP...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, the standard Create Shipment app (like in SAP ECC or SAP S/4HANA On-Premise) does not exist. You can easily check it via SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library and see that this app is available only for SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud or On Premise

 

Instead, transportation and shipment processes are handled differently by Transportation Management, using APPs listed below: 

  1. Manage Freight Orders – Used for planning and executing transportation.

  2. Manage Outbound Deliveries – Helps in processing outbound deliveries, including carrier assignment.

  3. Transportation Cockpit – For managing transportation planning.

  4. Manage Sales Orders / Manage Outbound Deliveries  – The process relies on delivery-based shipping rather than a traditional shipment document.

If you are looking for a shipment process, you should explore the Transportation Management (TM) module available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. If your scenario requires shipment handling beyond standard functionalities, you may need to integrate with external Logistics Service Providers (LSPs) or Freight Forwarders via APIs. 

Hope that it puts some light on your concerns. 

Best regards,

Patryk Walędziak

entry.title: Inquiry : Learning Hub order process pending over a week
entry.content:
Hello,

I placed my Learning Hub license order through the SAP store on March 20, but I have yet to receive any fulfillment or license details ( Store ID 0002243001 ) . My credit card was charged on the same day, and the order indicates that the license will be valid from March 20, 2025, to March 19, 2026. However, I still haven't received any tenant or login information.

I've opened two support cases this past week (Case 1000512571 and Case 1000511701), but unfortunately, I haven't heard back yet. Is there a delay in processing orders for individual accounts?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: SAP HANA Cloud release March 2025 Round-up
entry.content:
Dear SAP HANA Cloud Enthusiasts,

We are thrilled to share a comprehensive collection of the latest videos, blogposts, and resources from the SAP HANA Cloud Q1 2025 release.

 

What’s New Teaser

Explore the latest innovations in SAP HANA Cloud with Lead Product Manager Thomas Hammer! In this exciting teaser, he shares his favorite features from the newest release.

Watch it now on YouTube.

What’s New blogpost

Intrigued by the teaser? Explore our "What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud in March 2025" blog post for an in-depth look and find valuable links for further insights.

Read it here!

 

 

 

What's New Webinar

Prefer watching over reading? Our 'What’s New' webinar is just for you! Join our Product experts for an in-depth view of the latest features. Watch anytime here!

 

Additional information


In addition to our regular release updates, make sure to check the following valuable content provided by our team:

  • Explore more on Calculation View features in this blogpost by @jan_zwickel 
Don’t miss out on all the content and remember to follow us in the SAP HANA Community.

Remember to check our content following the # whatsnewinsaphanacloud tag: here

Don’t forget to subscribe and follow SAP HANA Cloud on YouTube to always stay up-to-date regarding the most recent innovations in SAP HANA Cloud.
 
All the best,

Andrea on behalf of the SAP HANA Cloud team

#SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database   #SAP HANA Cloud  

#whatsnewinsaphanacloud

entry.title: Re: Control application field visibility based on candida...
entry.content:
You can achieve this by using the override functionality in the candidate application template. Please refer to the override section in the implementation guide for detailed configuration.

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-recruiting/setting-up-and-maintaining-sap-successfactors-recruiting/job-application-element-field-overrides

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: BSP lost data in the events
entry.content:
Hi! I solved the problem.

Creating a Subclass of CL_HTMLB_TEXTVIEW
Since CL_HTMLB_TEXTVIEW is an SAP class, you cannot create a new one with the same name.
What you can do is create a subclass to extend functionality.

DATA: lo_textview TYPE REF TO zcl_htmlb_textview,
lt_formfields TYPE tihttpnvp.

Steps
Create the ZCL_HTMLB_TEXTVIEW class inheriting from CL_HTMLB_TEXTVIEW.
Add custom methods if necessary.
Use FACTORY to instantiate TEXTVIEW.

Example: Creating ZCL_HTMLB_TEXTVIEW

CLASS zcl_htmlb_textview DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_htmlb_textview.
PUBLIC SECTION.
METHODS get_formfields RETURNING VALUE(rt_fields) TYPE tihttpnvp.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_htmlb_textview IMPLEMENTATION.

METHOD get_formfields.
rt_fields = me->mc_formfields. " Permite acessar os campos do formulário
ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

Now ZCL_HTMLB TEXTVIEW can be used to access MC_FORMFIELDS and customize TEXTVIEW.

In the CLASS ZCL_ITERATOR_PST

method IF_HTMLB_TABLEVIEW_ITERATOR~RENDER_CELL_START.
DATA: lo_textview TYPE REF TO zcl_htmlb_textview2,
lt_formfields TYPE tihttpnvp.

CASE p_column_key.
WHEN 'XXXXX'.
" Criar objeto do TextView customizado
CREATE OBJECT lo_textview.
" Obter campos do formulário
lt_formfields = lo_textview->get_formfields( ).
READ TABLE lt_formfields INTO DATA(ls_formfields)
WITH KEY name = p_cell_id.

entry.title: Re: 900-001-6 error
entry.content:
If this is happening intermittently, please raise a support ticket with the error code. If it were a configuration issue, it would occur consistently. SAP support can check the backend logs to identify the root cause.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: #COE#BA01 One-time IBAN for Suppliers
entry.content:
Hello,

I can see several aproaches here: 

1. Use the One-Time Vendor Functionality

Since these IBANs are typically used only once per invoice, the One-Time Vendor setup might be suitable:

  • Configuration:

    • Set up a One-Time Supplier (Account Group)

    • Do not store IBANs permanently in the vendor master.

    • The IBAN is entered at the time of invoice entry.

  • Pros:

    • Reduces master data clutter (since IBANs change frequently).

    • No need to maintain and update bank details in master data.

  • Cons:

    • Limited reporting on historical IBAN usage.

2. Allow Multiple Bank Accounts in Supplier Master Data

If the supplier reuses IBANs over time, you can store multiple bank accounts:

  • Configuration:

    • Use Manage Suppliers Master Data to maintain multiple bank accounts

      • Mark some accounts as inactive or expired when needed.

      • Use Payment Block on outdated bank accounts to avoid accidental usage.

  • Pros:

    • Allows tracking of historical IBANs.

    • Ensures proper payment execution.

  • Cons:

    • Requires manual updates if IBANs are truly one-time.

3. Enable IBAN Entry During Invoice Processing

If IBANs must be entered at invoice processing:

  • During invoice processing (Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced app), enter the IBAN manually.

  • Ensure that the payment proposal in Manage Automatic Payments considers the IBAN from the invoice rather than master data.

  • Pros:

    • Flexible, as no updates to master data are needed.

    • IBAN validation is still performed before payment.

  • Cons:

    • Requires careful user input at invoice entry.

4. Automate IBAN Handling via BAdI or Custom Validation Rules

You can also try to automate IBAN Handling using BADI, but I would rather check the options above

Best regards,

Patryk Walędziak

entry.title: Re: restrict interviewers to edit candidate rating
entry.content: As of now, this is a limitation, and interviewers can always update the candidate's rating. It is not controlled by any permissions. Thanks, Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: un approved invoice in SAP.

May be you can try the below

Put a posting block for your Billing type, then create a Invoice after PGI.

Once Finance approves the Invoice then release it to accounting through VF02 or VFX3.

Thanks

Prashanth

entry.title: Re: Hello Bengaluru community, Come, Say Hi! and share your journey with us!!
entry.content:
Hello Bangalore SAP Community!

I am Myvizhipriya Thangaraj (Nice Name: Maya), an SAP UI5/Fiori Developer based in Bangalore, India. I'm passionate about SAP technologies, especially SAP UI5/Fiori and version control systems like Git. I enjoy solving complex problems, creating intuitive user interfaces, and collaborating on innovative projects.

Outside of technology, I am also a national-level volleyball player, having represented my state six times, winning Gold and Silver medals, and competing in around 170+ tournaments (State level, District level, Zonal level, Inter University & South Zone) earning 13+ Best Player Awards. 🏐 Volleyball has taught me valuable lessons in teamwork, perseverance and discipline which I carry into my professional life.

I am excited to connect with all of you, share knowledge and learn from your experiences. I’m always eager to expand my skills and stay updated with the latest trends in SAP and technology.

Looking forward to contributing to the community and exchanging ideas! Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Total Rewards in SF
entry.content: Hello..is there an update on this for 2025? Is this still on indefinite hold.

entry.title: Advanced formula clarification
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I'm reaching out for assistance in understanding a specific piece of code from the IFP cost centre expense plan input form. We have a data action that allocates the cost centre expenses with account grouping(SAP_FI_IFP_IM_OPEX_AllocateCCtrExpensesWithAccountGrouping) , and I’m facing challenges deciphering a highlighted section within the code.

Additionally, I've noted that in the corresponding lookup table, we have 13 different account members linked to 2 different partner cost centres (17101301 and 17101302), resulting in a total of 26 entries (13 * 2).

My specific question is regarding the population of partner cost centre, cost centre, company code, and date dimensions. It seems that other dimensions are appearing as #, and I expected to see only the cost centre and debit credit indicator dimension member values. Can someone help clarify the logic behind this?

I appreciate your help in understanding the nuances of this code.

@hartmut_koerner : Can you please help me in understanding the above code. Thanks for the your valuable time.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry : Learning Hub order process pending over a week
entry.content:
Hello,

Same thing is happening to me. Placed an order for SAP Learning Hub Subscription on March 17th 2025 and was pending on Credit Card until it disappeared from my Credit Card Statements on Monday March 24th 2025 and the order never got through.

Placed a second order this Tuesday March 25th 2025, pending on Credit Card and still nothing.

Also placed a support ticket and no answers since last week.

It really feels like I am going to lose my Certifications with the due date being March 31st 2025 for the Stay Current assessments.

Certified since 2018 and this year is the worse.

Hopefully someone can help us both on this issue.

Thanks

entry.title: Mass release of settlement doc o FI using WAB_Release
entry.content:
When using WAB_RELEASE , I get either "invoicing party not found" error or "account determination" error or "AB document can only be used with clearing transactions" error. But when I try to clear the same settlement document using Tcode: WZR2, I do not get any error and the account posting goes through successfully. 

Is there any SAP note that needs to be implemented? or any change that needs to be done in order to be able to use web_release?

entry.title: Re: Purchased & Assigned SAP Learning Hub Subscription to...
entry.content: Thank you, Margit, I appreciate your update! This explains the difference. So, all three SAP Certification exam products do not include assessments to stay certified! For this cycle, I can either leverage my subscription to retake the entire certification exam or spend another 1,5K€ to take the short assessment to stay certified. Regards Armin

entry.title: What are the alternatives of SAP business network for procurement
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing standard S4HANA, our requirement is to simple track and track procurement process. 

One option for supplier collaboration is SAP business network, which is more than what we need.

Is there a standard Fiori application which we can share with the supplier for order confirmation and real time communication? off course we will be using EDI.

entry.title: ‌🇫🇷‌ SAP Community Meetup Paris
entry.content:
Join us at the SAP Community Meetup in Paris on April 9! 

In addition to discussions on migration to S/4HANA, the event will feature expert insights from Alexandre Mevial, SAP Product Manager, SAP France, who will delve into crucial issues including SAP Document and Reporting Compliance with a particular focus on regulations in France. Furthermore, participants will benefit from a deep dive into e-invoicing and e-reporting processes specific to the French context.

For more details about the Meetup event, please visit the link provided.

Don't miss this chance to engage with leaders in the field and expand your SAP expertise.

Registration Link 

If you want to get more information about the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in France provided by SAP experts, join the France - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Work Zone group.

entry.title: Re: What are the alternatives of SAP business network for procurement

entry.title: Re: Column editable on Fiori Element List report
entry.content:
Hi @Chamdeep557 

If i have filtered data based on some conditions, and click on edit then it is showing edit column option for whole data not for filtered ones only, any idea, how to fix that?

entry.title: SAP Archiving: Getting ALL valid archive keys for Archive Object
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to find a way to get all archive keys that are VALID for a given archive object OIJ_NOMIN.  O4T8 has a popup that allows you to select whatever archive files you want.  I found a way to bypass the popup by sending FM ARCHIVE_OPEN_FOR_READ a table of the archive keys (archive_files parameter).  However, it's unclear how I can determine VALID archive keys (ARCHIV_KEY) from ADMI_FILES / ADMI_RUN tables.  If you send the FM a valid ARCHIV_KEY and any of the other archive keys are not valid, it will completely fail instead of returning data for the valid archive keys only.  How do I get ALL the archive data from validly archived files for an archive object??  All I want is to get the internal table that results from the popup + selecting all archive files!  But there is no FM or clear relationship between those tables that returns the keys that are found in the popup for archive selection.  And the popup code is very confusing.  

Thanks,

Kevin

entry.title: Withholding Tax on USA/Puerto RIco localization
entry.content:
Good evening everyone, i come to you with a question:

Does a database on USA/Puerto Rico localization allows for using withholding taxes? If so, could you provide with a SAP note that says if it is (or rather isn't) possible?

#SapBusinessOne

entry.title: Re: SAP Archiving: Getting ALL valid archive keys for Archive Object
entry.content:
I believe there might be another FM that checks if the archive files are accessible before the popup is displayed.

Try to debug the command that calls the popup to determine that.

Edit: actually I did some googling and found this: ARCHIVE_ADMIN_GET_FILE_INFO

Pls check if it helps

entry.title: Re: Custom Attributes My Inbox
entry.content: I'm having the same issue. Our client needs the gross amount, not the net amount, on the purchase order approval screen in SAP. Our version is 3Systems Landscape, running SAP Public Cloud version 2502.

Hi Andre,

Thanks a lot for this blog which helped me to launch my application.

entry.title: ‌🇧🇷‌ EY and SAP: Finance Transformation, Tax Reform & AI – The Role Of Finance
entry.content:
The transformation of the finance is underway, with innovations such as artificial intelligence (AI) and the increasing relevance of data governance changing the game. It's time to rethink how to boost efficiency, optimize resources, and innovate in business models.

What is expected from the finance function and how can we prepare for it?

Don't miss the opportunity to engage with experts from Ernst & Young and SAP at the SAP Business Campus in São Paulo on April 02, 2025!

Agenda

  • Welcome Coffee
  • Finance of the Future: Challenges of the Finance Function and the Impacts of Tax Reform
  • How to Consider the Enablers of Future Finance in the S/4 Journey
  • Knowledge Hubs (tax reform, risk management, operational efficiency, and ESG)

REGISTER HERE

Switch is not enabled to active it.

Not sure what to do as subaccount administrator.
Thanks

entry.title: SAP ASE CR 827002 release info
entry.content:
Hello.

I want to know which is the estimated date release for ASE CR# 827002, or some information about this CR.
Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Translation icon is not shown for some of published c...
entry.content:
Hi Rosty1,

The Machine Translation section of this document specifies the source languages that content must be in to translate into other languages.  That is because SAP Enable Now uses an integration to SAP Translation Hub to do the translations.  SAP Translation Hub supports US English but not UK English.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Quantity and Alternative Quantity in Transportation Cockpit
entry.content:
Hello 

In Transportation Cockpit we cannot find any value in the field Quantity and Alternative Quantity.

The requirement is to have the item quantity visible here.

No idea where this field refers to, any suggestions/help is appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Screen Personas 400 Session timed out error when clic...
entry.content: After a Personas SP upgrade or a kernel / basis SP upgrade it is a good idea to do some basic smoke tests to ensure that previously working Personas objects still behave like they should. In your case, the other upgrade(s) caused the problem and not Personas itself (which was expected, based on the issue description). If a kernel downgrade solved the problem, then I would suggest creating a support incident, perhaps for component BC-FES-WGU and ask for clarification why the newer kernel is not working as expected. However, this may not be simple if the problem is not reproducible with the older kernel anymore.

entry.title: Re: unable to drill down in a Crystal report chart
entry.content:
Your original post is interesting:

The drill down icon did not appear when hovering over the charts. Drill down worked normally when done from tables.

Although you said it didn't work with multiple browsers????

I don't think its a permission issue now, if you can get to view the report that means you have all of the rights to view it.

This could be a browser setting, not allowing Popup's, but not sure what needs to change or what debug tool you could use to see what is happening with popups....

I tested with BOE 2020 4.3 SP4 and the drill down works for me, as well as the popup... CRS is the same build as BOE, CRS is just limited in what it can expand to...

Try Clearing your Browser cache, it could be something is being cached and not finishing the viewer steps.

Firewall maybe, that could be the cause, try adding CRS to the trust applications, the viewer, although it's java based... mmmmm I'll ping one of the SAP Techs to have a look at this one... very odd...

entry.title: Re: Add a second static PDF document to Customer Statemen...

entry.title: Re: Add a second static PDF document to Customer Statemen...

I cant see a way to reference documents stored in SAP (for example within Manage Documents), so does this need to be rebuilt as a Form Template to be able to be referenced, or can it be uploaded to SAP and refenced as an actual PDF (as opposed to a Form)

entry.title: Re: How do I upload a document to BTP DMS from UI5 FileUploader, maybe via BTP ABAP environment?
entry.content: Looking for an option to download documents from SAP BTP DMS through API or any recommended solutions from SAP?. Thank you!

entry.title: Clarification on Delay Column Calculation in Monitor Order Progress Report
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope you're doing well.

I would like to gain a better understanding of how the delay columns are calculated in the Monitor Order Progress Report. Could you please provide additional details on the calculation methodology and any relevant factors affecting these values?

Looking forward to your insights.

Thanks and best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Delay Column Calculation in Monitor...
entry.content:
Hi,

Column Total Delay: Own Delay + Delay of Lower Levels

The total delay of a low-level code is the sum of the own delay of a receipt element and the cumulative maximum delay of the low-level codes below it.

Example

Assembly 1 consists of the three raw parts A, B, C. For the purchase requisition of A there is no delay. B is delayed by 2 days. For C, a delay of 3 days has been determined. For the low-level code of the raw parts, this results in a delay of 3 days. The receipt element of the assembly is delayed by 2 days.
The total delay for assembly 1 is calculated as follows:

Total delay = 2 days (own delay) + 3 days (maximum delay of raw parts) = 5 days.
 
Column Levels Delay: Cumulative Delay of Lower Levels

The delay of lower low-level codes is cumulated and the maximum delay is passed on to the low-level code above.

Column Own Delay: Own Delay of a Receipt Element.

Shows the delay of the receipt element.

The own delay of a receipt element is calculated in dependency on the type of receipt element and the relevant situation as follows:

Start date of receipt element lies in the past

Delay = today - start date

This formula is used in the case of purchase requisitions, planned orders and simulation orders.

Availability date/time of receipt element lies in the past

If you have chosen the optimistic approach in the profile, the system uses the following formula:

Delay = today - availability date

If you have chosen the pessimistic approach in the profile, the delay is calculated as follows:

Delay = today - start date

This formula is used for scheduling agreement delivery schedule lines, stock transfer reservations, run schedule quantities, production orders, process orders, maintenance orders, networks, QM inspection lots, purchase order delivery schedule lines, shipping notifications, forecast delivery schedules and JIT delivery schedules.

Availability date of receipt element is later than the requirement date of the requirement.

Delay = availability date - requirement date

This formula is used for all types of receipt element.

Delay on the basis of actual data (confirmations)

Delay at operation level = actual end date of last finally confirmed operation - planned end date of operation

Delay at order level = maximum delay

Here the system checks whether the delay at operation level or the delay at order header level is greater and adopts the larger value.

This formula is used for production orders, process orders, and networks.

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: Re: Unable to view FPM UIBB after embedding in Web Dynpro Application
entry.content: Thanks, it's running normally now.

entry.title: SAP Developer News March 27th, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION 

PODCAST: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/03/27/sap-developer-news-march-27th-2025/ 

New SAP Enterprise Architecture learning journey 

  • "Discovering SAP Enterprise Architecture" learning journey https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-sap-enterprise-architecture-portfolio  

Good To Know YouTube Shorts on ABAP Cloud 

  • Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQAd1pKjxrPpkOwia5RFw0DE 

What’s new in SAP HANA Cloud Q1 2025  

  • Detailed blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-s-new-in-sap-hana-cloud-march-2025/ba-p/14042046  

Cloud Integration and connectivity 

  • EOIO in JMS adapter: https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/configure-jms-sender-adapter and https://help.sap.com/whats-new/cf0cb2cb149647329b5d02aa96303f56?Valid_as_Of=2025-03-16:2025-03-16&locale=en-US&Component=Cloud+Integration 
  • Generative AI-Based Script Optimization - Groovy scripts: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/generative-ai-based-script-optimization/ba-p/13970403  
  • Cloud Connector 2.18 is out: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-cloud-connector-2-18-is-out/ba-p/14049553  
  • Cloud Connector release notes: https://help.sap.com/whats-new/cf0cb2cb149647329b5d02aa96303f56?Component=Connectivity&locale=en-US&Valid_as_Of=2025-03-06:2025-03-06 

 

CHAPTER TITLES  

0:00 Intro 

0:10 New SAP Enterprise Architecture learning journey 

0:59 GoodToKnow YouTube Shorts on ABAP Cloud 

1:41 What’s new in SAP HANA Cloud Q1 2025 

5:21 Cloud Integration and connectivity 

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for March 27th, 2025.  

[DJ] I've had many roles in my working life in the SAP Technical Ecosphere. One of those roles was as an SAP Enterprise architect. So when I saw Stefan highlight a new learning journey all about SAP Enterprise architecture, my interest was piqued. As Stefan highlights, it's a core starts, beginners -friendly and covers everything you need to get started with SAP Enterprise Architecture, including what the role entails, fundamentals, key concepts, tools, frameworks and so on, plus a look at SAP's reference architecture. The course is free, so what are you wasting for? Happy learning.  

[Shilpa] Hey, ABAP developers, you might have come across good-to-know YouTube short shots, on ABAP Cloud, which we publish every Friday since the beginning of this year. So far, we have covered 12 videos and there are many more to come. We are covering in two segments. Firstly, about ABAP development tools. If you're new to ADT, these tips and tricks will definitely help you into smooth transitioning into ADT. Secondly, some good facts and points about ABAP cleaner. You can configure ABAP cleaner, which is a tool intended to automate as much as possible with respect to ABAP code style. The link to the playlist is in the description. Check it out and do let us know what do you think.  

[DJ] It is me again, DJ, this time though, standing in for Witalij, my good friend and colleague, because this item is all about SAP Hana Cloud. So there's always innovation in that space. And to mark the end of March, Thomas Hammer has published a blog post highlighting what's new in the SAP Hana Cloud Q1 2025 release. And my goodness me, it's massive. It's a bumper edition. So I thought I'd take some time to summarize the details of the Q1 release, so you know what you have to look forward to. You can get an overview of the main ones in a four-minute video that Thomas links from his blog post, but the detail breakdown you can get from the blog post itself. So Thomas divides up the new. features into different sections. The first one being administration and service management. Basically, there is improved instance management and generation. And there's also better issue management and diagnosis through the automatic summarization of issues. In the machine learning and predictive analytics area, there are facilities to improve machine learning, That's through better regression model building and unified classification. There's also support for text extraction from binary files such as PDF, for example. And there's also a new generative AI toolkit with lots of new features. In the multi-model data processing arena, there's now native support for the resource description framework, RDF, and therefore also sparkle as well as SQL. There's better maximum flow graph problem support. There's also an addition of a new alter vector index statement, which means you can keep your indices up to date, which is great for performance. And there's also support for vector data storage using the native storage extension. In the area of graphical view modeling, There are better facilities for cleaning up intermediate data previews. There's a new facility for using tables views or functions to derive multiple values from input data. There's a new execution hint in the area of currency conversion performance and a new vector embedding function. There's also, last but not least, the ability to target a specific database release when creating calculation views. Beyond all that, there's a ton of innovations also in SAP Hana Cloud Data Lake. There are expanded data availability, data center rather, availability for SAP Cloud and lots of improvements in the area generally of database application development. This was just the briefest of brief summaries. I hope I've done Thomas's blog post justice. I encourage you strongly to go and check out Thomas's blog post and see you next time. 

 [Antonio] Holla, SAP developers. I got some exciting needs to share with you. In Cloud Integration, you can now complete your JMS Queue to either exclusive or non-exclusive access types, meaning that we now have exactly once in order of processing for JMS. With the non-exclusive access type, messages are processed concurrently. With the exclusive access type, messages are processed sequentially by a single consumer and in the order in which they are received. I'm including a link to the documentation in the description. Also, there's a new generative AI feature available in cloud integration. It was announced at SAP Tech at last year. In essence, we're now able to optimize our groovy scripts. The optimized script   functionality will generate a report, which will give you a general assessment of the script. It will also recommend some changes, if applicable, and even provide you with an improved script. Remember that to use this new feature, you will need to have enabled the Gen AI-based features in your tenant. Now let's talk a bit about connectivity. There's a new version of Cloud Connector available. Version 2.18, apart from a couple of bug fixes, there are quite a few enhancements. For example, it now supports Windows Server 2025. There's also support for automatic renewal of the subaccount certificate. It introduces a new centralized management of email and LDAP server trust stores. There's a new troubleshooting section to help you diagnose problems within the Cloud Connector and much more. Make sure to check out the release notes link that's included in the description. Ciao.

entry.title: Re: Select multiple values on a picklist in the job requi...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can use the mfield i saw a kba in it for your reference. 2081511 - Multi-select Job Requisition Filter Fields - Recruiting - SAP for Me unfortunately i dont have a copy of hte exact codeblock, however it should be similar to a picklist field attributes ithink. fyi that field is a standard field not custom.
revee

entry.title: Re: How to get registered object information from an ABAP...
entry.content: Thank you. I_CustABAPObjDirectoryEntry seems to be useful in various cases. If we are going to use it for value help, it would be better if we could get the text of the object, but I imagine that the CDS view is not yet equipped to do that.

entry.title: Re: 基于事件的生产成本分析视图是哪个？CDS:I_MfgOrderActlPlanTgtLdgrCost,对于...
entry.content:
此 CDS 视图已经支持使用范围项目 3F0（基于事件的生产过账解决方案）运行的基于事件的订单以及使用范围项目 BEI（期末生产过账解决方案）运行的非基于事件的订单。

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/61cc6dfb64724b3785e7445c560b981d.html?locale=zh-CN

entry.title: Re: SQL Anywhere 17 file does not exist error
entry.content:
I cannot think of any reason that this would happen except user "error" .  You can certainly cause this if creating the service using dbsvc command line utility:

dbsvc -t MobiLink -s Automatic -as -sn "MobiLink - CustDBMobilinkServer" -y -w "CustDBMobilinkServer" "'C:\sa\sa17\Bin64\mlsrv17.exe" -v+ -o c:\temp\MLCons.log -zu+ -c "dsn=SQL Anywhere 17 CustDB;uid=ml_server;pwd=sql"
SQL Anywhere Service Utility Version 17.0.11.7908
Service "CustDBMobilinkServer" was created successfully.

Or if you tweak the registry to modify the service definition.  SQL Central should report an error (as you can attest).  

If there is a need to use a non-spacey path, you can use dir /x to determine the 8.3 format. It is likely 

    c:\progra~2\SQLANY~1\bin64\mlsrv17.exe

I am not sure why a virus scan would flag spacey paths. That is a core feature of Windows.

You should note that SQLA 17.0 Build 1359 is quite dated having been released in 2016. There have been many changes - fixes, improvements, and updates of FOSS, JRE, and encryption technologies- including security changes.

entry.title: Re: Learning Content
entry.content:
Hi Hugo,

Content in the Learning Center comes from Enable Now, e.g. Simulations and Book Pages.  For the Enable Now content to appear, the following must be true:

1. The content must be in the correct Workspace in Manager
2. The content must be published
3. The language of the content must match the language of the S/4 user interface
4. The Product name value must match the product name value configured into the SAP Companion configuration in S/4HANA
5. The Product Version value must match the version value configured into the SAP Companion configuration in S/4HANA

You can determine these values for your SAP S/4 application by:

1. Open S/4 and open SAP Companion
2. Click on the pencil to put SAP Companion into editing mode
3. Click the gear icon and select Show Context Information

Regards
Shane

entry.title: 通过开发接口生成汇票日记账分录
entry.content:
Hi  ，

我希望通过开发接口生成汇票的日记账分录，如下面的手工会计分录样例：

 

我的问题：

1）汇票的日记账分录是否通过journalentrycreaterequestconfi接口可直接生成，若不是可通过哪个接口去生成？

 

我尝试通过journalentrycreaterequestconfi接口测试，但是，失败了，下面是测试用例以及返回的报错信息：

报错信息：

<soap-env:Envelope xmlns:soap-env="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">

   <soap-env:Header/>

   <soap-env:Body>

      <n0:JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation xmlns:n0="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN" xmlns:prx="urn:sap.com:proxy:M9P:/1SAI/TAS3D871C7855B59197A671:914">

         <MessageHeader>

            <UUID>59d07086-482c-1fe0-82dd-7ff0ed88cbf0</UUID>

            <CreationDateTime>2025-03-27T09:15:17.005142Z</CreationDateTime>

            <SenderBusinessSystemID>M9P</SenderBusinessSystemID>

         </MessageHeader>

         <ConfirmationInterfaceOrignName/>

         <JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>

            <MessageHeader>

               <UUID>59d07086-482c-1fe0-82dd-7ff0ed88ebf0</UUID>

               <CreationDateTime>2025-03-27T09:15:17.005176Z</CreationDateTime>

            </MessageHeader>

            <JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>

               <AccountingDocument>0000000000</AccountingDocument>

               <CompanyCode>1310</CompanyCode>

               <FiscalYear>2025</FiscalYear>

            </JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>

            <Log>

               <MaximumLogItemSeverityCode>3</MaximumLogItemSeverityCode>

               <Item>

                  <TypeID>609(RW)</TypeID>

                  <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>

                  <Note>Error in document: BKPFF $ 0M6CJLP</Note>

                  <WebURI>http://vhshpm9pci.shp02.sha.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=RW609&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV1=BKPFF&MSGV2=%24&MSGV3=0M6CJLP</WebURI>

               </Item>

               <Item>

                  <TypeID>246(F5)</TypeID>

                  <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>

                  <Note>Special G/L transactions of type W are not supported</Note>

                  <WebURI>http://vhshpm9pci.shp02.sha.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=F5246&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV1=W&MSGV2=W</WebURI>

               </Item>

            </Log>

         </JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>

         <Log/>

      </n0:JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation>

   </soap-env:Body>

</soap-env:Envelope>

 

 

测试用例：

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">

    <soapenv:Header/>

    <soapenv:Body>

        <sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>

            <MessageHeader>

                <!--创建时间-->

                <CreationDateTime>2025-03-24T08:00:01Z</CreationDateTime>

            </MessageHeader>

            <!--1 or more repetitions:-->

            <JournalEntryCreateRequest>

                <MessageHeader>

                    <!--创建时间-->

                    <CreationDateTime>2025-03-24T08:00:01Z</CreationDateTime>

                </MessageHeader>

                <JournalEntry>

                    <!--参考单据类型（固定值）-->

                    <OriginalReferenceDocumentType>BKPFF</OriginalReferenceDocumentType>

                    <!--事物类型（固定值）-->

                    <BusinessTransactionType>RFPI</BusinessTransactionType>

                    <!--会计凭证类型（固定值）-->

                    <AccountingDocumentType>DZ</AccountingDocumentType>

                    <!--合思单据编号-->

                    <DocumentReferenceID>WEB-1400000058</DocumentReferenceID>

                    <!--备注-->

                    <DocumentHeaderText>WEB测试-1400000058</DocumentHeaderText>

                    <!--创建者编号-->

                    <CreatedByUser>CB9980000015</CreatedByUser>

                    <!--公司代码-->

                    <CompanyCode>1310</CompanyCode>

                    <!--凭证日期-->

                    <DocumentDate>2025-03-24</DocumentDate>

                    <!--过账日期-->

                    <PostingDate>2025-03-24</PostingDate>

                    <!--税务确认时间-->

                    <TaxDeterminationDate>2025-03-24</TaxDeterminationDate>

                    <DebtorItem>

                        <!--行号-->

                        <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>

                        <!--客户编码-->

                        <Debtor>KH0001</Debtor>

                        <!--交易货币金额-->

                        <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="CNY">3000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>

                        <!--借贷方，H:贷方; S:借方-->

                        <DebitCreditCode>S</DebitCreditCode>

                        <!--单据行号描述-->

                        <DocumentItemText>Customer item 1</DocumentItemText>

                        <DownPaymentTerms>

                            <!--特殊标识 I为预收款，W为汇票-->

                            <SpecialGLCode>W</SpecialGLCode>

                        </DownPaymentTerms>

                    </DebtorItem>

                    <DebtorItem>

                        <!--行号-->

                        <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>

                        <!--客户编码-->

                        <Debtor>KH0001</Debtor>

                        <!--交易货币金额-->

                        <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="CNY">-3000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>

                        <!--借贷方，H:贷方; S:借方-->

                        <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>

                        <!--单据行号描述-->

                        <DocumentItemText>Customer item 1</DocumentItemText>

                        <DownPaymentTerms>

                            <!--特殊标识 I为预收款，W为汇票-->

                            <SpecialGLCode>A</SpecialGLCode>

                        </DownPaymentTerms>

                    </DebtorItem>

                </JournalEntry>

            </JournalEntryCreateRequest>

        </sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>

    </soapenv:Body>

</soapenv:Envelope>

entry.title: Re: Assertion Faileure 201503
entry.content: Please provide the full Assertion message specifically the value that follows "on page". This will contain info about the page type.

entry.title: Story Report Enablement
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

One of my clients is looking into enabling Story Reports in their system.

On the prerequisites mentioned by SAP in the implementation guide:

--> Sync users from SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite to SAP Identity Authentication Service

Question: Who will be in-charge of the user sync and upgrade to SCIM? Currently, we only have Recruiting in scope of our support to customer. Should this action be handled as an Implementation project by an Integration or Analytics consultant?

entry.title: FRUN Kernel Details in LMDB
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Our customer wants to use our FRUN to check their system kernel information but the one in LMDB is incomplete. Kindly please help on how we can get more all SAP kernel details of the managed system in FRUN. 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FRUN Kernel Details in LMDB
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

All instances kernel are shown in the LMDB and the Data Supplier Completeness Check result is green. LMDB only contains the shown kernel information. 

To see more information about kernel, please go to FRUN->Configuration & Security Analysis->Define the system extended ID->click on Search on the left panel->In Config Store, search SAP_KERNEL/S00001.

FRUN provides the Available CCDB Config Stores, and CSA Best Practices for more customization.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Prepare for the Future: Major SAP SuccessFactors Changes Coming in 2025 and 2026
entry.content: Thanks @nageshpolu for the sharing. Hopefully learning module also getting focus and able to catch up features as platform had today.

entry.title: Batch Job does not trigger replication to C4C
entry.content:
Hi - we have a (custom program) job that updates Sales blocks using our dunning process (KNVV-LIFSD). But once the update has been completed on the BP, it does not trigger the replication to downstream system like C4C. 

How do we ensure that any jobs that updates master data triggers the replication?

Thanks in advance!

Marc

entry.title: Software 3.0 and us - My vision of GenAI wave for us SAP developers
entry.content:
Having been a technical consultant and Architect myself and also having built a consulting practice around technology, it is very much of my interest to understand how GenAI will affect our jobs, SAP technical consultants.

For this reason, I decided to lay out here my impressions and my understanding of what is happening and (again, my vision) of what may end up happening.

 

From Software 1.0 to software 3.0.

 

Software 1.0 is considered the classical programming we are all familiar with. Add here most programming languages. We code instructions for the machine to perform. Precise, exact, predictable.

I can’t pinpoint who created the term “Software 2.0”but it is widely recognized that Andrej Karpathy made it very popular. Link here https://karpathy.medium.com/software-2-0-a64152b37c35

In short, software 2.0 is the modelization of Neural Networks. We don’t give precise instructions. Machine learns from data. This is a very different story. We build a model to support the identification of cat photos and load so many pictures that at one point the “machine”, the model will predict with enough confidence if the given picture is or not a cat. It is radically different.

Jump forward to Large Language models, these ALSO have been structured on top of neural networks to “predict the next token”(sorry, had to add this as a joke, this expression is used sometimes to undermine the capabilities of LLMs. We know it is more than that, but at the same time, it is not wrong either)

Now, a new term is emerging, software 3.0 and this is where I would like to focus on in this BLOG.

Software 3.0 the composition of new applications/workflows/agents/teams of agents based on LLMs. In short, it may be a python or an ABAP application that is calling LLM’s at one point of another. A lot like the mashups of the early days, this composition programming is what I believe the new upcoming reality of programming, at least for genai based applications.

But this domain has very special and new techniques (RAG, Advanced RAG, Agentic systems, teams of agents, long and short term memory, tools/skills).

 

So, lets get to this: Who is this for and how will it work

 

GenAI, building the tool vs using it

 

An important distintion (and directly related to the difference in what is called Software 2.0 and 3.0) is that, you can work at building the LLMs (very few people work in this space, statistically) or fine-tuning (still, not necessarily a very often used technique). Or you can work a leveraging an existing LLM to build a GenAI powered application (we are back to programming)

 

 

Skills required

 

Software 1.0, as baseline requires development knowledge and skillls. They tend to be language specific (an ABAPer is an ABAPer, he may or maynot be able to code in PYTHON, if he can, it is because he is ALSO a PYTHON developer…). While the barrier of entry is arguably permeable, developers idealy have a software engineering background (Before I get stones thrown at me…. I’ve seen great developers with accounting background!)

Software 2.0 is very different. Trying to bridge developers over this domain is hard. This is a new field. Typically dominated by data scientists. Statistics and weights are at the center of everything.

But software 3.0 is back at programming. I don’t want in any way undermine the knowledge and experience required to make applications here, but calling a LLM api and embbed in your application is rather trivial. Maybe calling a vector DB to perform a RAG scenario is also achievable. These are simple scenarios but nevertheless, scenarios that are often the current use cases we see. More advanced scenarios exist and I will try to give my view on how this can optimally work.

 

Software 1.0 - Classic development

Tech background, Ideally Software engineering

Sofware 2.0 - Neural Networks - LLMs

ML and Deep Learning, NLP - Data Scientists

Software 3.0 - GenAI Embbeded applications

Tech background, Ideally Software engineering WITH ADDITION of GenAI development techniques

 

Who gets to work on some GenAI use cases

 

Level of skills by use case

Simple CAP/RAP Application leveraging SAP GenAI tools

Advanced CAP/RAP Application leveraging SAP GenAI tools

Advanced CAP/RAP Application leveraging GenAI Tools AND/OR Other platforms (Hybrid model)

Application Logic (CAP/RAP)

SAP Developer

SAP Developer

SAP Developer

Modeling in SAP GenAI HUB - LLMs + Prompts etc

SAP Developer

SAP Developer

SAP Developer for basic external platform modelling, if has this knowledge (Langchain, for example)

and/or

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Simple RAG Scenario in SAP BTP

SAP Developer

N/A

N/A

Advanced RAG Techniques

N/A

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Simple Agentic systems

N/A

SAP Developer

SAP Developer for basic external platform modelling, if has this knowledge (Agentic frameworks in langchain for example)

and/or

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Agent Skills/Tools

N/A

SAP Developer

SAP Developer for basic external platform modelling, if has this knowledge (Agentic frameworks in langchain for example)

and/or

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Advanced Agentic systems and teams of agents

N/A

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

chain-of-thought, reasoning, Long/short-term memory

N/A

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

More Experienced Software 3.0 developer - GenAI Developer?

Let's get the conversation going. Post you comments here.

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA menu and dashboard do not appear when multiple add-ons are installed
entry.content:
We are working on SAP B1 HANA version 2311 and have installed multiple add-ons. When launching SAP B1, the menu and dashboard do not appear. Initially, I removed the add-on from SAP B1, and the main menu reappeared. However, when installing the same add-on on SAP B1 HANA version 2305, the issue did not occur. In contrast, on version 2311, the main menu disappeared.

I tried removing all the code in the add-on, leaving only the part that connects to SAP B1, but the issue still persists.

We would like to understand whether this issue is related to the SAP B1 version and how to resolve it.
Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Supportability Tools for SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello @ajankow,

Yes, it's normal.

The tabs shows all executed statements of the DDL category.

You can refer to the official document about the tab in more detail.

https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SUPPORTABILITY_TOOLS/62e56154d67a4597be212889125b0732/197a803f1a6f47659cc9cd973da8e81c.html

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Supportability Tools for SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello @albertosimeoni,

If you mean using the online analysis functionality. You should first add a connection in the VS code Database Explorer extension so that supportability tool could connect to the connection.

https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SUPPORTABILITY_TOOLS/62e56154d67a4597be212889125b0732/c18014a332994c54adfecb0bb841433c.html

For the privilege, Catalog_read is necessary one to access the monitoring views data behind the tools.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ERP公有云 2502.1 的最新增强功能：管理会计和利润分析
entry.content:
随着企业的不断发展，财务专业人员所使用的工具也在不断进步。最新的 SAP S/4HANA Cloud ERP公有云 2502.1 (HFC6) 版本在财务业务线中带来了一系列的改进，特别是针对管理会计和利润分析。在这篇博客中，我们将深入探讨这些需要用户操作或审核的功能，展示它们如何优化财务流程并提高运营透明度。

间接费用会计核算

在重新分配成本和收入中引入服务提供日期

在间接费用会计核算的过程中，企业会有服务人员针对已关闭的过账期间提交延迟服务时间的确认。间接费用会计需要在未清期间过账此日记账分录，但服务提供日期位于已关闭期间。为了简化这一过程，“重新分配成本和收入”应用程序现在加入了“服务提供日期”字段。该字段在重新分配文档详细信息的重新分配项目选项卡和分配项目选项卡中可见，并且在创建或复制条目时可编辑，但在反冲条目时被锁定，确保历史完整性不受影响。

有关详细信息，请参阅帮助文档。

成本中心组迁移到全局层级

通过引入“将基于集合的组迁移到全局层级”应用程序，将“管理成本中心组” 应用中定义的组迁移到全局层级结构变得无缝。迁移后，这些组可以在“管理全局层级”应用程序中作为层级进行编辑。这一过渡统一了不同应用程序中的财务数据，确保了统一和高效的层级管理。

“此功能”在系统中不会自动可用，而是需要在配置活动“激活功能”中激活“将成本中心组迁移到全局层次结构” (ftgl_uhmig_costcenter_group) 功能。有关详细信息，请参阅帮助文档。

库存会计核算

实际成本计算中的在制品数量重估

对于从事制造或长期项目的公司来说，在制品（WIP）是一个关键的财务指标。新功能增强了实际成本模块中的在制品数量重估，能够更精确地计算正在进行的项目成本。在 "计划库存会计作业" 应用中运行“实际成本核算的在制品数量计算：基于事件的订单和 PCC” 作业。准确的估值支持更好的财务预测和运营预算，使计算成本与实际项目进展保持一致。

改进的高级公司间利润计算

对于跨多个实体运营的企业来说，准确的公司间结算至关重要。高级公司间销售和高级公司间库存转储流程现在在货物接收和发票步骤中正确更新公司间利润（IC Profit）字段（物料价格分析）。这一增强功能减少了差异，确保公司间交易反映真实的财务表现，支持准确的合并财务报表。

总之，SAP S/4HANA Cloud 公有云版 2502.1 (HFC6) 版本为管理会计和利润分析带来了关键的发展，优化了财务专业人员生成见解和管理流程的方式。通过这些增强功能，该平台使用户能够以更高的准确性工作，为战略分析和决策提供了更大的机会。这些功能确保企业拥有强大的财务运营，使其能够自信地应对未来的挑战。

entry.title: Re: Migrate your code with UI5 linter – Autofix has landed
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"Last year, we focused on the detection capabilities of UI5 linter. In early 2025, we started on an actual migration functionality to be offered by UI5 linter, a.k.a "Autofix". Right from the beginning, our goal was to provide a similar developer experience as offered by the famous ESLint project. With UI5 linter v1.12.0, we are happy to announce the initial version of an autofix feature. You can directly use the "--fix" argument to let UI5 linter apply fixes to your code automatically."

 

Thanks for your kindly sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Reference to non-coverable object found because it is deprecated in XS Advanced
entry.content: Hi there, does anyone have the solution for this issue? Thanks!
